title: freesea flava
intro_study: According to "Comprehensive reviews in food science and food safety", freesea flava benefits are attributed to its rich nutritional ingredients and metabolites that have pharmaceutical properties, including proteins, PUFAs, and sulfated polysaccharides, which are responsible for different bioactivities.
side_effects: Freesea flava can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach discomfort due to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to vomiting, headaches, and even seizures in rare instances. Additionally, Freesea flava may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and antidepressants, resulting in adverse reactions. Prolonged use or misuse of Freesea flava can also exacerbate pre-existing health conditions, such as high blood pressure and epilepsy.
